message:
Command `# Look at nc_socgen Makefile or fw build to understand build_fw_smoke
grep -r "build_fw_smoke\|build_xip\|riscv" /nc/apps/nc_socgen/nc_socgen/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -20` executed with exit code 0.
